    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    E

    endedAt() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.GameResult
    Returns the timestamp when the match ended.
    EndGame_Builder_Add - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    End-game building that multiplies points contributed by builder characters.
    EndGame_Builder_Add(Era, Position, int, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.EndGame_Builder_Add
    Creates the builder multiplier end-game building.
    Endgame_Effect - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    Building effect that grants end-game points based on matching character targets.
    Endgame_Effect(Era, Position, int, int, List, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Endgame_Effect
    Creates an end-game effect building.
    endgameBonus() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.PlayerScore
    Returns the final endgame bonus points.
    ensureDatabaseExists(String, int, String, String, String, int, int) - Static method in class it.polimi.Game.Persistence.MySqlGameResultRepository
    Ensures that the MySQL database exists.
    Era - Enum Class in it.polimi.Constants
    Represents the different eras in the game Mesos.
    Event - Class in it.polimi.Abstract
    Base class for all event cards in the game.
    Event(Era, Position, EventType) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Abstract.Event
    Creates an event card with the given era, position, and event type.
    Event_Add_Effect - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    Building effect that rewards the player when a specific event occurs.
    Event_Add_Effect(Era, Position, int, int, EventType, CharacterType, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Event_Add_Effect
    Creates an event-triggered effect building.
    Event_Less_Ritual - Class in it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual
    Represents a ritual building that provides protection for players with the minimum number of stars.
    Event_Less_Ritual(Era, Position, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.Event_Less_Ritual
    Constructs an Event_Less_Ritual building with the specified properties.
    Event_Most_Ritual - Class in it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual
    Represents a ritual building that rewards the player with the highest star count.
    Event_Most_Ritual(Era, Position, int, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.Event_Most_Ritual
    Constructs an Event_Most_Ritual building with the specified properties.
    Event_Sustenance_Effect - Class in it.polimi.Buildings
    Building effect that reduces sustenance cost based on matching characters.
    Event_Sustenance_Effect(Era, Position, int, int, int, CharacterType) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Event_Sustenance_Effect
    Creates a sustenance effect building.
    EventContext - Class in it.polimi.Abstract
    Data container used to pass the current game context (like involved players) to event effects.
    EventContext(List) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Abstract.EventContext
    Creates a context containing the players involved in the event.
    EventsData() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Game.Core.CardLoader.EventsData
     
    EventType - Enum Class in it.polimi.Constants
    Enumerates the types of events that can occur during the game.
    executeAction(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Applies the tile effect to the selected player.
    executeRound() - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Executes a full round: prepares tiles, resolves the first round if needed, updates rows, and advances the round counter.
    executeTurn(Player, List, List) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Validates a player's selected cards and applies the turn to the game state.
